Staff of the Elder Claws  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 32
DMG: 20 Dmg Bonus: 124
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10 WIS: +25 MANA: +100
SV FIRE: +10 SV DISEASE: +10 SV COLD: +10 SV MAGIC: +10 SV POISON: +10
WT: 0.7 Size: MEDIUM
Class: CLR DRU SHM BST BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

# Aug 22 2001 at 11:09 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591749817370
Scholar
397 posts
great 2hb but not better than epic + sarnak shield. Not even close in fact.

Depending what it looks like I'd only use this thing for special occaisions. It dont even have a right click effect. Don't get me wrong... the stats rule, just not as much as epic + sarnak battle shield.

# Aug 23 2001 at 4:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245846566
176 posts
I agree whole heartily Mandicus... I too am a shaman who would probably only use this on special occasions... heck if im not mistaken the granite face grinder is better dmg/dly ratio if thats what you are looking for.... and if you looking for resists you probably wouldnt be using this hehe.

#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 21 2001 at 4:18 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Notice also that now "Wu's Fighting Armour" is usable bye -
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 21 2001 at 10:58 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) That does not mean that Vah'Shir will be able to be Monks...
#Anonymous, Posted: Aug 21 2001 at 9:41 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) OK no one has said anything useful about the item. I do belive that this is suppose to have posts about the item named above. This is not the "what is a beastmaster" thread, so move it somewhere else guys unless its about the item!
RE: So far
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2001 at 9:24 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247037290
37 posts
The existence of a picture of a Vah`Shir in plate does nothing to prove or disprove whether or not the Beastlord is a Warrior/Shaman hybrid. According to all reports thus far, they will indeed be Monk/Shaman hybrids, a picture of Vah`Shir in plate simply confirms that they can be pure Warriors.
▲ Page top
RE: So far
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2001 at 7:59 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Supposedly the Vah'shir can be bards too which is a plate class.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Aug 20 2001 at 8:34 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) So far i haven't run into any chain/plate with beastlord as a class. also several FAQs read that beastlord only get 1hand and don't get duel wield. they'll get a 1hander and shield.
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 20 2001 at 10:25 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Yes they will dual wield, the shardwurm stinger, an offhand only piercer, has beastlord as a class. Their "parent" classes are the monk and shaman with a little bit of their own stuff thrown in, in the same vein of the Bard's parent classes being rogue and enchanter with a bit of their own stuff thrown in.
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 21 2001 at 3:10 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Actually, if you read again through all the materials what are available so far on beastlords, then you see that it's stated numerous times that the beastlord will be a warrior and a shaman hybrid, with the ability of summoning the pet. Kind of like SK - hybrid type with a pet.
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 21 2001 at 1:59 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Ya, but my monk is wearing some cured silk and it says troll, ogre, barbarian for races and monk and the beasty people. So ya I do think that races that can be shammys will be beastlords. Now what do you think a troll or ogre will look like in a cured silk gi.
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 20 2001 at 5:16 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Are they allready putting in beastmaster items? look at the class list, bst, just think about it?
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 20 2001 at 7:03 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Nice 7x gm on test, you can set your skills on that server lmao.
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 20 2001 at 6:06 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This is most likely because SoL is currently in the test phase. It appears that the same item files are used on test and the live servers. There are several items I've seen recently that have VAL under race, like raw-hide armor. This may also be to help keep the first SoL patch from being too big.
drops of .....?
